tests.skip_policy: Each family checks its env var and required model.safetensors/tokenizer.json files before loading; missing inputs emit a SKIPPED outcome instead of panicking.

tests.description: ignored end-to-end llama.cpp runtime smoke test covering load, capabilities, generation, optional LoRA, KV quantization/prefix replay, ngram speculation, score, embed, flight-recorder events, and unload
tests.run_command: cargo test -p handshake_core --features llama-cpp-runtime-engine --target-dir ../Handshake_Artifacts/handshake-cargo-target --test llama_cpp_e2e_smoke llama_cpp_e2e_smoke -- --ignored --nocapture
tests.skip_policy: If HANDSHAKE_TEST_GGUF_PATH is absent, the ignored smoke test emits a SKIPPED outcome and returns success. If HANDSHAKE_TEST_LORA_PATH is absent, only the LoRA substep is skipped and the remaining smoke path still executes. If HANDSHAKE_TEST_LORA_EXPECT_DIFFERENT is present, the LoRA substep also requires a curated fixture that changes the deterministic token stream. If either path env var is present but invalid, the test fails loudly.
tests.artifact_policy: Use CARGO_TARGET_DIR or --target-dir under ../Handshake_Artifacts/handshake-cargo-target; do not write smoke-test artifacts into the repository.
